Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mount Venture]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — The Kazan wagons are laden with goods from Mount Venture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Mount Venture is located to the west of Sacred Valley and features rust-red cliffs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Mount Venture is the shortest of the four holy peaks and is a primary site for mining in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — The Kazan clan and the Golden Sword School share the profits from mining on Mount Venture.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Mount Venture is a sacred peak to the west.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Mount Venture is a squat red-tinged peak to the west.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Mount Venture is a location with distant peaks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Mount Venture is located to the west.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon wonders if Mount Venture is still intact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Mount Venture is gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Mount Venture is in ruins.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Mount Venture is a shattered mountain that emits yellow light.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
